---
title: "legacy_chaos.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\src\legacy_chaos.py"
loc: 5
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.38
style_score: 9.58
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 5.08
---

## Intent
The `legacy_chaos.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on legacy_function. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via legacy_function. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 2 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `legacy_function`
